name: Mushroom Fondue
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a saucepan.
2. Add mushrooms and garlic; cook gently for 10 minutes.
3. Stir in chicken stock and simmer for another 10 minutes.
4. Allow the mixture to cool slightly, then puree it in a blender or food processor.
5. Pour some cream into the fondue pot.
6. Blend in cornflour smoothly.
7. Add the remaining cream and mushroom puree.
8. Heat gently until thickened, stirring frequently.
9. Season with salt, pepper, and cayenne.
10. Serve with cubes of cheese and garlic sausage.
(Serves 4-6)
